title: Check Dynamic Modeling Data — CheckDynData
text: function checks whether data frame variables structure required dynamic modeling utility functions.

title: Check Dynamic Modeling Data — CheckDynData
code: CheckDynData(   data,   id,   time,   observed,   covariates = NULL,   require_unique = TRUE,   require_numeric_time = TRUE,   require_numeric_observed = TRUE,   require_numeric_covariates = FALSE,   min_rows = 2L )

title: Check Dynamic Modeling Data — CheckDynData
text: data Data frame. data frame object data potentially multiple subjects contain column subject ID numbers (.e., ID variable), column indicating subject-specific measurement occasions (.e., TIME variable), least one column observed values. id Character string. character string name ID variable data. time Character string. character string name TIME variable data. observed Character vector. vector character strings names observed variables data. covariates Character vector. vector character strings names covariates data. require_unique Logical. TRUE, require unique id-time combinations. require_numeric_time Logical. TRUE, require time variable numeric. require_numeric_observed Logical. TRUE, require observed variables numeric. require_numeric_covariates Logical. TRUE, require covariates numeric. min_rows Positive integer. Minimum number rows required per ID.

title: Check Dynamic Modeling Data — CheckDynData
text: Returns TRUE invisibly checks pass.

title: Check Dynamic Modeling Data — CheckDynData
text: Ivan Jacob Agaloos Pesigan

title: Check Dynamic Modeling Data — CheckDynData
code: data <- data.frame(   id = rep(1:2, each = 3),   time = rep(1:3, times = 2),   y1 = rnorm(6),   y2 = rnorm(6) ) CheckDynData(   data = data,   id = "id",   time = "time",   observed = c("y1", "y2") )
